title: Option to show Date/Time of Events in Activity Log instead of 40m, 5d, etc
excerpt: I am aware that you can hover over the text of 40m, 5d, etc to see the Date/Time of the Event but everyone here that uses Monday would just prefer to see the actual date and time.

posts.author: WoodrowKilns (Matt Slattery)
posts.cookedHtml: I am aware that you can hover over the text of 40m, 5d, etc to see the Date/Time of the Event but everyone here that uses Monday would just prefer to see the actual date and time.
